intro_1.text: woah... am I actually a cat right now?? this is so cool :3

cam_look.text:
okay, let me look around a bit ^_^
(Hint: move your mouse! try looking left, right, up and down!)

cam_done.text: yep. yep yep. this is real. >:3

wasd_move.text:
ooh, I wonder if I can actually walk around... let me try owo
(Hint: press W, A, S, and D to move!)

wasd_done.text: there we go! look at these little legs :3

sprint_walk_hint.text:
I need to figure out how to control my speed better, too...
(Hint: Sprint by holding Shift, Walk by holding Alt!)

crouch_hint.text:
oh wait... can I crouch too?! :o
(Hint: hold C to crouch!)

swat_hint.text:
Also... it would be REALLY COOL if I could swat my paw at things :0
(Hint: hold Left Mouse to "Swat" your paw at objects!)

swat_modifiers_hint.text:
wait, can I also change how hard I swat?! 0_0
(Hint: hold Shift+LMB to swat harder, hold Alt+LMB to swat softer!)

bite_hint.text:
ooh... what if I right click on something nearby?! let me try!
(Hint: hold Right Mouse to bite and pull objects toward you!)

jump_try.text:
NO WAY, THIS IS EPIC! I could literally jump with joy!!! ^_^
(Hint: Hold spacebar to charge up your jump!)

npc_search.text: I should see if anyone else is around now!

npc_end.text: I should also explore this place... looks like there's lots of fun stuff to do :o
